ddls:
CREATE TABLE "concrete_mixes" (
  "mix_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each concrete mix */,
  "cement" REAL /* Amount of cement used in kg */,
  "blast_furnace_slag" REAL /* Amount of blast furnace slag used in kg */,
  "fly_ash" REAL /* Amount of fly ash used in kg */,
  "water" REAL /* Amount of water used in liters */,
  "superplasticizer" REAL /* Amount of superplasticizer used in liters */,
  "coarse_aggregate" REAL /* Amount of coarse aggregate used in kg */,
  "fine_aggregate" REAL /* Amount of fine aggregate used in kg */,
  "mix_name" TEXT /* A descriptive name for the concrete mix */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date when the mix was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date when the mix was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the mix */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* The user who last modified the mix */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the mix */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mix_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strength_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strength test */,
  "mix_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the concrete mix being tested */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the concrete in days */,
  "compressive_strength" REAL /* Measured compressive strength in MPa */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* The date when the strength test was performed */,
  "conducted_by" INTEGER /* The user who conducted the test */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the test */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the test (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strength_tests_mix_id FOREIGN KEY ("mix_id") REFERENCES concrete_mixes ("mix_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "ingredient_name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient (e.g., cement, sand) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ingredient */,
  "cost_per_kg" REAL /* Cost per kilogram of the ingredient */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* The manufacturer of the ingredient */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* The supplier of the ingredient */,
  "unit" TEXT /* The unit of measurement for the ingredient (e.g., kg, liters) */,
  "available_stock" REAL /* The current stock available in the inventory */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* The date when the stock was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mix_ingredients" (
  "mix_ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mix ingredient entry */,
  "mix_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the concrete mix */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ingredient used */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the ingredient used in kg */,
  "unit" TEXT /* The unit of measurement for the ingredient used in the mix */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* The batch number of the ingredient used */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* The expiry date of the ingredient used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mix_ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mix_ingredients_ingredient_id FOREIGN KEY ("ingredient_id") REFERENCES ingredients ("ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mix_ingredients_mix_id FOREIGN KEY ("mix_id") REFERENCES concrete_mixes ("mix_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the construction project */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The expected end date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed, on hold) */,
  "project_manager" INTEGER /* The project manager assigned to the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_mixes" (
  "project_mix_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the project mix entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the construction project */,
  "mix_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the concrete mix */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the concrete mix used in cubic meters */,
  "mix_usage_date" TEXT /* The date when the mix was used in the project */,
  "mix_usage_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the mix usage */,
  "quality_rating" TEXT /* A rating of the mix quality (e.g., excellent, good, poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_mix_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_mixes_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_mixes_mix_id FOREIGN KEY ("mix_id") REFERENCES concrete_mixes ("mix_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, manager, technician) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* The date when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the section */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section of the platform being accessed */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* The date when the access entry was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date when the access entry was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* The user who last modified the access entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related project */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report detailing performance and recommendations */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* The user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* The type of report (e.g., performance, cost analysis, recommendations) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* The file path where the report is stored */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the report (e.g., draft, final, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_controls" (
  "qc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control check */,
  "mix_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the concrete mix being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality control check */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the quality control check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments on the quality control check */,
  "conducted_by" INTEGER /* The user who conducted the quality control check */,
  "check_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the check */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the check (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_controls_mix_id FOREIGN KEY ("mix_id") REFERENCES concrete_mixes ("mix_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_controls_conducted_by FOREIGN KEY ("conducted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message content */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* The type of notification (e.g., project update, test result) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* The priority level of the notification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
